finding_results.notes: Replaced abstract consequence summary with concrete physical/environmental/action beats (radiator knock, pixel zoom, meltwater curl, clipped pages, pen/paper friction) while retaining legal pressure.
Closing now shows active drafting struggle via sequential attempts and an explicit strike-through/rephrase instead of a polished recap paragraph.
Removed the 'almost ... instead ...' suppression template; response to estate counsel is immediate and embodied under pressure.
Replaced generic stillness phrasing with a specific somatic response tied to the legal decision reveal.

summary: All four packet findings were addressed in place with minimal structural churn: suppression-template and default-stillness tics were replaced, and the chapter close was rebuilt with concrete sensory/action detail plus visible drafting friction while preserving continuity and causal stakes.
